trivia_bullets.text: Cautious Survivor is a Creature — Elf Survivor from Duskmourn: House of Horror (DSK). The Survivor creature type is new to DSK, introduced alongside the Survival ability word. All DSK Survivors carry Survival triggers, mechanically reflecting the set's horror-movie trope of a protagonist enduring impossible odds. [Scryfall type_line; magic.wizards.com/en/news/feature/duskmourn-house-of-horror-mechanics]

Survival is an ability word introduced in DSK that triggers at the beginning of your second main phase if the creature with the ability is tapped. Cautious Survivor's trigger grants 2 life. The Wizards mechanics article states: 'Survival feels very connected to Duskmourn's horror movie troping' and the second main phase timing is deliberate — the creature must have survived combat or been otherwise tapped first. Survival is predominantly a white and green mechanic. The card is a 4/4 for {3}{G} with pauper legality. EDHREC rank 18,854. [magic.wizards.com/en/news/feature/duskmourn-house-of-horror-mechanics; Scryfall; EDHREC]

Flavor text: "She came back alone, with her recorder broken and its footage scrambled. Whatever she had experienced, she never spoke of again." The text frames the card as a found-footage horror survivor: someone who witnessed something inside the House and chose (or was unable) to report it — a classic horror trope of the unreliable or traumatized witness. [Scryfall]
Art is by Jodie Muir. The card is a common with no reprint history as of the Scryfall prints search. [Scryfall artist field; Scryfall prints_search_uri]
